Authentication.SecureVault: Store credentials (Damancom Username, Password, Certificate/Private Key) securely in a cryptographically encrypted vault (using pgcrypto or Supabase Vault). Never expose passwords in plain text or frontend logs.

EDIGeneration.FileFormat: Official CNSS/Damancom fixed-width text format or XML for Monthly Wage Declaration (Bordereau de Déclaration de Salaires).
EDIGeneration.DataPayload: Each employee row must contain: Matricule CNSS (9 digits), Nom/Prénom, Salaire Brut Réel, Salaire Brut Plafonné (6000.00 MAD cap), and Number of days worked (Max 26 days per month).

AutomationWorkflow.Step: Run an internal validation test to ensure all employees have a valid 9-digit CNSS number and structural anomalies are flagged.
Generate the compliant EDI file payload from the current month's calculated payroll table.

Provide a UI interface inside "Declarations" showing a "Téléverser vers Damancom" button. Implement a secure backend worker (or API route) that uses a headless browser automation script (like Puppeteer/Playwright) or direct secure endpoints to authenticate into the Damancom portal using the encrypted credentials, upload the generated EDI file, and parse the return status (Accepté / Erreur).

UI_Components.CredentialsForm: Inputs: Adhérent ID, Code Utilisateur, Mot de passe, and an optional Certificate File picker.
UI_Components.SyncStatus: Display a historical table of EDI submissions with statuses: "En attente", "Transmis à la CNSS", "Validé (Accusé de réception disponible)", or "Rejeté (avec logs d'erreurs détaillés)".
